rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7)

rightValue.stringValue: Solution Gap - Pricing and packaging unfit for use case

Solution Gap - Product or features unfit for use case

rules.label: IPOR - Changed to Yes/Yes but no Number

Flow.description: Temporarily reverted MIS-8188 changes MIS-8311 - Added Sub Motion and YoY Sub Division update MIS-8188 - Alert for field changes after closed won/lost MIS-8264 - Added outbound message to Workato on Renewal Lost MIS-8255 - new Sub Motion field MIS-8186 - Moved Manager fields updates from Before-Save MIS-7984 - Added default Type to converted opps MIS-8003 deactivate Uri_open_Opp_over_15k email alert in opp rt after save MIS-7853 Lean MEDDPICC: Recommended Close Date - Move to external flow and add a daily update MIS-7609 Remove Product Sold : remove solutions 3.0 MIS-7153 - Deactivate Acquired Company Opps MIS-6575 - remove the slack channeles actions MIS-6795 - Closed Won for NT Account MIS-6750 Slack channel for all Americas Closed Won deals - addition MIS-6575 slack channel for inside sales EMEA closed won deals for AM and SM only MIS-6750 Slack channel for all Americas Closed Won deals, 16\3\25 tal MIS-6202 Open a Case from Opp - ‘One Time Product’ MQ-2398 & MQ-2371 MIS-6639 & MIS-6640 MIS-6405 - Update First Commit Date and ARR MIS-6187 - Update on one-time email logic MQ-2328 MQ-2127 - email notfaction for PO MIS-5956 - Client Uses PO Logic MIS-5151 - update Champion / Economic buyer logic MIS-4721 - new Champion / Economic buyer logic MIS-3586/MIS-4644 - Migrating last process builder MIS-4528 - Update Division and SubDivision from Owner MIS-4112 - Update Contact fields Economic Buyer / Champion MIS-4433 - Move *Rule(RBID)* with its sub-flow to flow start MIS-4163 - add opportunity owner Sub Division MIS-3096 - Create New note for Next Steps

formulas.description: This formula generates a dynamic audit log that tracks changes for the following 13 fields: Account AM, Assigned CSM Name, Forecasting Status, Amount, Close Date, Cycle Price, Cycle, Cycle Price Local, Max ARR, Type, Record Type, and Owner. It uses ISCHANGED logic to ensure only modified fields are listed, keeping the output clean. For every change detected, it displays the field name followed by the "Previous value" and "New value" on a new line. It automatically handles data conversion for picklists, dates, and currency fields to ensure the information is human-readable.
formulas.name: COS_Changed_fields_text_formula
formulas.expression:
IF(ISCHANGED({!$Record.Account_AM__c}), "Account AM: Previous value: " & {!$Record__Prior.Account_AM__c} & ', ' & "New value: " & {!$Record.Account_AM__c} & '

', "") & IF(ISCHANGED({!$Record.Assigned_CSM_Name__c}), "Assigned CSM: Previous value: " & {!$Record__Prior.Assigned_CSM_Name__c} & ', ' & "New value: " & {!$Record.Assigned_CSM_Name__c} & '

', "") & IF(ISCHANGED({!$Record.Similarweb_Forecasting_status__c}), "Forecasting Status: Previous value: " & TEXT({!$Record__Prior.Similarweb_Forecasting_status__c}) & ', ' & "New value: " & TEXT({!$Record.Similarweb_Forecasting_status__c}) & '

', "") & IF(ISCHANGED({!$Record.Amount}), "Amount: Previous value: " & TEXT({!$Record__Prior.Amount}) & ', ' & "New value: " & TEXT({!$Record.Amount}) & '

', "") & IF(ISCHANGED({!$Record.CloseDate}), "Close Date: Previous value: " & TEXT({!$Record__Prior.CloseDate}) & ', ' & "New value: " & TEXT({!$Record.CloseDate}) & '

', "") & IF(ISCHANGED({!$Record.Cycle_Price__c}), "Cycle Price: Previous value: " & TEXT({!$Record__Prior.Cycle_Price__c}) & ', ' & "New value: " & TEXT({!$Record.Cycle_Price__c}) & '

', "") & IF(ISCHANGED({!$Record.Cycle__c}), "Cycle: Previous value: " & TEXT({!$Record__Prior.Cycle__c}) & ', ' & "New value: " & TEXT({!$Record.Cycle__c}) & '

', "") & IF(ISCHANGED({!$Record.Cycle_Price_Local__c}), "Cycle Price Local: Previous value: " & TEXT({!$Record__Prior.Cycle_Price_Local__c}) & ', ' & "New value: " & TEXT({!$Record.Cycle_Price_Local__c}) & '

', "") & IF(ISCHANGED({!$Record.Max_ARR__c}), "Max ARR: Previous value: " & TEXT({!$Record__Prior.Max_ARR__c}) & ', ' & "New value: " & TEXT({!$Record.Max_ARR__c}) & '

', "") & IF(ISCHANGED({!$Record.Type}), "Type: Previous value: " & TEXT({!$Record__Prior.Type}) & ', ' & "New value: " & TEXT({!$Record.Type}) & '

', "") & IF(ISCHANGED({!$Record.RecordTypeId}), "Record Type ID: Previous value: " & {!$Record__Prior.RecordTypeId} & ', ' & "New value: " & {!$Record.RecordTypeId} & '

', "") & IF(ISCHANGED({!$Record.OwnerId}), "Owner ID: Previous value: " & {!$Record__Prior.OwnerId} & ', ' & "New value: " & {!$Record.OwnerId} & '

', "")

formulas.name: FR_First_Commit_Month_Check
formulas.expression: IF( AND( MONTH({!$Record.First_Commit_Date__c}) = MONTH(TODAY()), YEAR({!$Record.First_Commit_Date__c}) = YEAR(TODAY()) ), TRUE, FALSE )

formulas.name: fr_ManagerOfManagerEmail
Remove_No_Touch

recordCreates.label: RW - Add Owner to Account Team

recordUpdates.name: Delete_No_Touch_from_Account_Name
recordUpdates.label: Delete " - No Touch" from Account Name

textTemplates.name: COS_EmailBodyText
textTemplates.text:
Hello,

Please note that the below edits were made in a closed opportunity.

Opportunity: {!oppLink}

Close Date: {!$Record.CloseDate}

Last Modified by: {!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName}

At {!$Record.LastModifiedDate}

{!COS_Changed_fields_text_formula}﻿

textTemplates.name: COS_EmailSubject
textTemplates.text: Fields have been updated in a closed opportunity: {!$Record.Name}

textTemplates.name: Email_header_PO_by_billing
textTemplates.text: Customer PO Received! For Your Opp: {!$Record.Name}

textTemplates.name: Email_header_PO_not_by_Billing
textTemplates.text: Customer PO Received! For The Opp: {!$Record.Name}, Zuora Account #: {!Get_Zuora_billing_Account.Zuora__AccountNumber__c}

textTemplates.name: One_Time_Deal_Desk_Case_Body
textTemplates.text:
Hi Deal Desk,
This closed-won opportunity includes a one-time product:
Please make sure to review this opportunity accordingly: {!opp_record_link}
If the contract specifies a one-time fee for the one-time product(s) included, separate from the other recurring products in the contract, make sure there is a separate closed won opportunity for that one-time product and price. If there isn't, instruct the opportunity owner to create a one-time opp (cycle = one-time, ARR = $0) and close won it.
Ensure that the sum of the cycle price in the opportunities (the one-time opp and the recurring revenue opp) is equal to the total price of the signed contract, and that the ARR is accurate for each opp.
For example, if you have a contract for 2 years for a total of $40,000, of which $10,000 is specifically dedicated to a one-time product --> 2 separate opportunities are required:
A one-time opp; cycle = one-time; cycle price = $10,000; ARR = $0
Another opp for the recurring revenue; cycle = 2 years; cycle price = $30,000; ARR = $15,000
*If the contract indicates that the one-time product fee is grouped in with the recurring product(s) fees [i.e. no specific/separate fee assigned to the one-time product(s)], then simply proceed to review the opp as per usual.

textTemplates.name: one_time_product_email
textTemplates.text:
Hi Sops,

This Closed Won opportunity - {!opp_record_link} includes a one-time product.

Please make sure to review this opportunity accordingly:

What should be checked:

  1. First, verify the quote and the contract including a one-time product with a value higher than $0.
  2. Make sure there is a separate opp for the one-time product - if there isn't, create it manually and close win it under the rep's name. In case the One time products have been sold together with RR products, please ensure that sum of the opportunities, and cycle price, is equal to the amount of the contract. For example, if you have a contract of $40,000, on which $15,000 are One-time product (needs to be in a separate opp as a cycle: one-time) + $25,000 as ARR (that will be into a separate opp under a cycle: annually, 2 years, etc)
  3. Check what is the price of the one-time product - because it should be reduced from the ARR of the first opp, then we should insert it as the cycle price of the one-time opp, while making sure the Cycle is defined as One-time.

How to understand what is the price of the one-time product:

  • Check the "Subscription Product & Charges" layout.
  • Check for a related billing ticket
  • Ask the rep for the price

textTemplates.name: Po_email_Not_billing
textTemplates.text:
Hi {!$Record.Owner.FirstName} {!$Record.Owner.LastName}/AR, 


The customer PO for your Opportunity {!$Record.Name} has been received,

Opp Owner: No action required.

AR Team: Please ensure Zuora and the invoice have been updated accordingly and shared with the customer.

Zuora Billing Account Number: {!Get_Zuora_billing_Account.Zuora__AccountNumber__c}

﻿Zuora Billing Account ID: {!Get_Zuora_billing_Account.Zuora__Zuora_Id__c}

Have a great day!


Thank you

textTemplates.name: PO_Notification_By_biilling
textTemplates.text:
Hi {!$Record.Owner.FirstName} {!$Record.Owner.LastName}, 


The customer PO for your Opportunity {!$Record.Name} has been received, and the opportunity has been updated accordingly.

No action is required, this is just an FYI.

Have a great day!

Thank you,

textTemplates.name: SDR_Lost_email_template
textTemplates.text:
Hi,

An Opportunity that was created from an SDR meeting was marked as closed lost.

Opportunity p name: {!$Record.Name}



Account: {!$Record.AccountId}

Meeting Name: {!$Record.Related_Meeting__r.Name}

Meeting creator: {!$Record.Related_Meeting__r.Owner:User.FirstName} {!$Record.Related_Meeting__r.Owner:User.LastName}

Meeting created date: {!$Record.Related_Meeting__r.CreatedDate}

Cycle Price ($): {!$Record.Cycle_Price__c}

Cycle: {!$Record.Cycle__c}

Type: {!$Record.Type}

Original Renewal Date: {!$Record.Original_Renewal_Date__c}

Closed Lost Reason: {!$Record.Closed_Lost_Reason__c}

Customer Primary Use Case: {!$Record.Primary_Use_Case__c}

Customer Secondary Use Case: {!$Record.Secondary_Use_Case__c}

Additional details: {!$Record.Closed_Lost_Reason_More_details__c}

Using a Competitor: {!$Record.Competition__c}

Competitor Product: {!$Record.Competitor_Product__c}

Deal lost to a Competitor (Y/N): {!$Record.Deal_Lost_To_a_Competitor__c}


Opportunity Link: {!opp_record_link}
